close_reason: All 4 children closed. Snapshot format evolution complete.
description:
Materializer needs to upload snapshots to object storage efficiently.

Prerequisites: bedrock-wxf (ObjectStorage) is complete.

Deliverables (as subtasks):
- bedrock-9ks8.1: Footer-based index format (single file, streamable)
- bedrock-9ks8.2: Streaming upload capability
- bedrock-9ks8.3: Olivine compaction changes
- bedrock-9ks8.4: Snapshot loading for cold start

NOTE: 70% of groundwork exists (footer-based scanning, snapshot blocks, compaction).

Ready for implementation - start with 9ks8.1 (format design).
title: Snapshot Format Evolution
